title: With Iran, Trump Takes the U.S. to War Without the Public’s Support
summary_full: In opening a military campaign against Iran, President Trump is the first president in modern times to take the United States to war without the backing of the public.
summary_public: In opening a military campaign against Iran, President Trump is the first president in modern times to take the United States to war without the backing of the public.
